steps.text: The room is quiet. Morning light slowly fills Alex’s room through the window.
An alarm has already gone off. Another school day begins.
Alex is already dressed and ready.
She checks her bag carefully. Everything is in place.
Her phone lights up. A message from Mia.
She reads it, then sets it aside.
The morning feels calm... almost too calm.
Alex takes one last look around her room, then leaves.
